series_metadata.series_description: Requests from applicants asking how they can obtain foreign licenses (Certification Ltr), to show cancellation of their resident license (Clearance Ltr), and/or a copy of their insurance license (Duplicate Lic).

retention_rules.disposition: Microform: Retain until audited by state and report released, then destroy. ; Paper: Retain until audited by state and report released, then destroy., Microform: Erase ; Paper: Wastepaper
